Name: Storage swipe panels
Notes: Swipe through fridge, pantry, cupboard, and wine fridge panels.

Name: Fridge/freezer compartment open flow
Notes: Tap fridge to open freezer/fridge compartment selector and editable lists.

Name: Master inventory grouped by category and storage
Notes: Shows category groups with storage sub-headers; Cooked Food appears first.

Name: Scoped active-area inventory
Notes: Instock stamp opens inventory scoped to the active storage area.

Name: Expiring Soon earliest-first layout
Notes: No category headers; grouped by storage area and sorted by expiry date.

Name: Item add/edit form with storage picker
Notes: Supports Freezer, Fridge, Pantry, Cupboard, and Wine Fridge without fridge compartment dropdown.

Name: Expiry defaults for freezer and cooked food
Notes: Freezer defaults to 6 months; cooked food defaults to 4 days unless frozen.

Name: Item suggestion history
Notes: Suggestions support fast re-adding and prefill category/storage/notes/photo.

Name: Meal note creation and editing
Notes: Meal notes can be added and edited from fridge-door notes view and sidebar.

Name: Meal note photo upload quality
Notes: Meal note uploads resize to 1080px and render direct photo URLs.

Name: Inventory and polaroid photo upload sizing
Notes: Inventory item photos and fridge-door polaroids resize to 500px.

Name: Shopping list with stores and suggestions
Notes: Shopping items support store grouping, category, checked state, delete, and suggestions.

Name: Sidebar kitchen log
Notes: Sidebar ordered Expiring Soon, Master Inventory, Shopping List, Weekly Meal Planner, Meal Notes, and History.

Name: Fridge door photo polaroids
Notes: Four uploadable polaroids with crop modal portaled above the fridge.

Name: Fridge door magnet decoration
Notes: Letter magnets, heart magnets, weekly meal planner magnet, and cut-out F-15 magnet are displayed on the door.

Name: Weekly meal planner
Notes: Mon–Sun breakfast/lunch/dinner planner with per-day edit/save, fridge-door magnet, sidebar entry, and Supabase sync.

Name: Storage navigation lock for kitchen overlays
Notes: Disables storage swipe and hides tab bar while kitchen notes or weekly planner is open.

Name: PWA app icon and manifest
Notes: Manifest and custom fridge app icon with heart magnet are in place.

Name: Supabase storage area migration
Notes: Confirm supabase-storage-areas.sql has been run in production.

Notes: Confirm supabase-meal-notes-photo.sql has been run in production.

Notes: Cover add item, edit item, expiring soon, and sidebar meal note editing.

Notes: Check fridge door decorations, swipe hint, stamps, and photo overlays on small screens.
